scripts.dev: trap 'kill 0' INT; pnpm dev:web & pnpm dev:api & wait
scripts.dev:mobile: trap 'kill 0' INT; pnpm dev:api & pnpm --filter @meetmind/mobile dev & wait
scripts.dev:mobile:ios: trap 'kill 0' INT; pnpm dev:api & pnpm --filter @meetmind/mobile ios & wait
scripts.dev:mobile:android: trap 'kill 0' INT; pnpm dev:api & pnpm --filter @meetmind/mobile android & wait
scripts.dev:all: trap 'kill 0' INT; pnpm dev:api & pnpm dev:web & pnpm --filter @meetmind/mobile dev & wait
